message:
feat(fp-frame): add pivot_table_with_margins, interpolate_method, and fillna_dict

Add several new DataFrame and Series methods:
- interpolate_method(linear/nearest/zero/pad) for Series and DataFrame
- pivot_table_with_margins for aggregate margin rows/columns
- fillna_dict for per-column fill values
- replace_dict for per-column replacement mappings
- sort_values_na with na_position parameter (Series + DataFrame)
- groupby agg_multi for multi-function per-column aggregation
- compare_scalars_with_na_position helper for NA-aware sorting

26 new tests, bringing fp-frame to 817 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
